com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter.PayloadSplitter

Packages that use PayloadSplitter
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter
Scatter/gather splitter contracts and context types.
com.societegenerale.failover.lookup
Spring BeanFactory-based lookups that resolve the named KeyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy and PayloadSplitter beans referenced by Failover.keyGenerator(), Failover.expiryPolicy() and Failover.payloadSplitter().

  • Uses of PayloadSplitter in com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PayloadSplitter<T,R>
    PayloadSplitterLookup.lookup(String name)
    Returns the PayloadSplitter registered under name, or null if not found.
